description_long: This is a modern commercial jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a pair of swept-back wings mounted low on the body. The aircraft features two large turbofan engines positioned under each wing, and a conventional tail assembly with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear is in a tricycle configuration, with two main gear units under the wings and a nose gear under the cockpit. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage and is enclosed, with multiple windows visible. The exterior is predominantly a dark blue color with a glossy finish, giving it a sleek and polished appearance.
description: A dark blue, modern commercial jet airplane with swept-back low wings, underwing engines, and a conventional tail. The aircraft has a glossy, streamlined exterior and an enclosed forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose, cockpit windows, and the full wingspan with underwing engines clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the fuselage profile, wing sweep, engine placement, and the tail assembly.
description_view_2: Rear view is mostly obscured by a gray plane, with only the tail and part of the wings faintly visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile of the fuselage, wing, engine, and tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and slight dihedral; no visible winglets.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows.
